transition.label: queue_len < MAX_WAIT
vehicle_arrive!

vehicleMove[generatedVehicle] = generatedMove, vehicleActive[generatedVehicle] = true, vehicleRequest[generatedVehicle] = generatedMove, requestPending[generatedVehicle] = true, waitTime[generatedVehicle] = 0, cost[generatedVehicle] = (generatedMove == 1 || generatedMove == 2 || generatedMove == 3 || generatedMove == 4) ? 1 : 2, generatedVehicle = (generatedVehicle == 3 ? 0 : generatedVehicle + 1), generatedMove = (generatedMove == 12 ? 1 : generatedMove + 1)
sched_clk <= SCHED_DEADLINE && system_busy == false

queue_len > 0 && system_busy == false && emergency_flag == 0 && has_proposal == true && selectedVehicle >= 0 && selectedVehicle <= 3 && (((vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 1 || vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 9 || vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 10) && Q2 == false && Q3 == false)|| ((vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 2 || vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 11|| vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 12) && Q4 == false && Q1 == false)|| ((vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 3 || vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 6 || vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 7) && Q4 == false && Q3 == false) || ((vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 4 || vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 5 || vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] == 8) && Q2 == false && Q1 == false))
schedule_accept!
exec_clk = 0, system_busy = true, has_proposal = false, queue_len = queue_len - 1
Q1 = false, Q2 = false, Q3 = false, Q4 = false, system_busy = false, vehicleRequest[selectedVehicle] = -1, requestPending[selectedVehicle] = false
